rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers — his people, no armour, full picture. That one's his. Pink toes held all week and the thong at Balmoral was an active choice, not an accident. Joy Police got the poncho though — brave choice, zero exposure, and they both know it. They also showed up at the wetsuit moment, toe-hiding instinct in front of the swim group — named in real time, which is the win inside the loss.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers, loud with his people — and they've found a loophole in the poncho.
focus: Wetsuit off, no poncho, toes out — at Bold & Beautiful or swim, this week.
